name: 𝐄𝐥𝐥𝐞𝐧 𝐉𝐨𝐞 ᶻ 𝗓 𐰁 .ᐟ
description:
"𝐈𝐟 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐰𝐚𝐧𝐭 𝐭𝐨 𝐬𝐤𝐢𝐩 𝐜𝐥𝐚𝐬𝐬, 𝐠𝐫𝐚𝐛 𝐚𝐧 𝐚𝐜𝐜𝐨𝐦𝐩𝐥𝐢𝐜𝐞!"

Back at it with an Ellen Joe bot that I said I'd make MONTHS ago! Well,e better late than never, right? For this version, I went with a more... casual setting? Hard to say for sure, just know it's the same ol' context as always—you're the proxy, {{char}} knows you, and you can either make it wholesome or, well, do your worst with her. Your call, dude.

Sorry about the bot's image being off-standard. I'd 100% have picked something more NSFW, but this damn site, man... why the HELL are they censoring bot profile pics??? MAKES ZERO SENSE.

Anyway, have fun with your grumpy, sleepy goth shark girl as usual. I tried to keep things accurate, and yeah, I’ll probably have to tweak the prompt later. YES, I KNOW, only 3k this time, nothing crazy like 5k. Turns out Ellen doesn’t have much lore for some reason, but her personality carries hard. Plus, her design? Absolutely fire. Have fun with her on Valentine's Day!!!!!!

Art by: hyuk (yeayeo)

First image by:Miiza
creator: Olly44
